news.title:
Housing finance stocks rally post RBI's unchanged repo rate; PNB Housing gains 7%, Home First Finance up 6%.
Bernstein sees >25% upside in Aadhar Housing (TP: Rs 600) and Home First Finance (TP: Rs 1,430).
news.summary:
Housing finance stocks rally post RBI's unchanged repo rate; PNB Housing gains 7%, Home First Finance up 6%.
Bernstein sees >25% upside in Aadhar Housing (TP: Rs 600) and Home First Finance (TP: Rs 1,430).

news.title:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.
Top picks include Bharti Airtel, Tata Steel, Home First Finance, and premium consumer plays like Titan and HUL.
news.summary:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.
Top picks include Bharti Airtel, Tata Steel, Home First Finance, and premium consumer plays like Titan and HUL.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquired over 5% equity in Home First Finance Company India Ltd.
Post-acquisition, KMMF holds 5.1% of Home First Finance shares via open market transactions.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquired over 5% equity in Home First Finance Company India Ltd.
Post-acquisition, KMMF holds 5.1% of Home First Finance shares via open market transactions.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Home First Finance with ₹1,380 TP, citing ~25% YoY AUM growth.
Strong traction in Gujarat/Maharashtra/MP/Rajasthan and improving asset quality noted.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Home First Finance with ₹1,380 TP, citing ~25% YoY AUM growth.
Strong traction in Gujarat/Maharashtra/MP/Rajasthan and improving asset quality noted.

news.title:
Home First Finance announced its schedule for analyst and investor interactions from March 2-12, 2026.
The company will attend the Investec Conference on March 9, 2026, and refer to publicly available documents.
news.summary:
Home First Finance announced its schedule for analyst and investor interactions from March 2-12, 2026.
The company will attend the Investec Conference on March 9, 2026, and refer to publicly available documents.

news.title: Home First Finance stock declines as 5.4% equity worth ₹662 crore is traded.
news.summary: Home First Finance stock declines as 5.4% equity worth ₹662 crore is traded.

news.title:
Home First Finance witnessed a block deal of 56.2 lakh shares worth Rs 662.6 crore.
The transaction represented 5.4% equity of the company.
news.summary:
Home First Finance witnessed a block deal of 56.2 lakh shares worth Rs 662.6 crore.
The transaction represented 5.4% equity of the company.

news.title:
Home First Finance Company India Ltd reported a 24.9% YoY AUM growth in Q3 FY26, reaching ₹14,925 crore. Disbursements hit an all-time high at ₹1,318 crore, up 10.5% YoY.
Asset quality remains stable; GNPA at 2%. The company plans 25% AUM growth in FY27 and expanded its branch network, adding two branches in Q3 with more planned in Q4.
news.summary:
Home First Finance Company India Ltd reported a 24.9% YoY AUM growth in Q3 FY26, reaching ₹14,925 crore. Disbursements hit an all-time high at ₹1,318 crore, up 10.5% YoY.
Asset quality remains stable; GNPA at 2%. The company plans 25% AUM growth in FY27 and expanded its branch network, adding two branches in Q3 with more planned in Q4.

news.title:
Home First Finance will interact with investors/analysts on Jan 29, 2026.
The company will attend MANTHAN and Axis Capital's conferences in Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Home First Finance will interact with investors/analysts on Jan 29, 2026.
The company will attend MANTHAN and Axis Capital's conferences in Feb 2026.

news.title:
Home First Fin emerged as the top gainer on Nifty 500.
The surge followed the announcement of strong Q3 results.
news.summary:
Home First Fin emerged as the top gainer on Nifty 500.
The surge followed the announcement of strong Q3 results.

news.title: Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight on Home First with ₹1,640 target price.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight on Home First with ₹1,640 target price.

news.title:
Home First Finance targets 25% YoY AUM growth by FY27 through distribution strategies, tech, and risk management.
Growth is also supported by diverse funding sources and enhanced risk measures.
news.summary:
Home First Finance targets 25% YoY AUM growth by FY27 through distribution strategies, tech, and risk management.
Growth is also supported by diverse funding sources and enhanced risk measures.

news.title:
Home First Finance sets credit cost guidance at 30-40 bps.
The company emphasizes disciplined risk management to support growth.
news.summary:
Home First Finance sets credit cost guidance at 30-40 bps.
The company emphasizes disciplined risk management to support growth.

news.title:
Home First Finance Q3 net profit rises to 1.4B INR from 974M YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 4.8B INR from 4.06B INR YOY.
news.summary:
Home First Finance Q3 net profit rises to 1.4B INR from 974M YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 4.8B INR from 4.06B INR YOY.

news.title:
Home First Finance's AUM grew 24.9% YoY to ₹14,925 Cr; disbursements hit ₹1,318 Cr, up 10.5%.
PAT increased 44% YoY to ₹140 Cr; GNPA remains stable at 2.0%.
news.summary:
Home First Finance's AUM grew 24.9% YoY to ₹14,925 Cr; disbursements hit ₹1,318 Cr, up 10.5%.
PAT increased 44% YoY to ₹140 Cr; GNPA remains stable at 2.0%.

news.title:
Home First Finance reported Q3 interest income of Rs 4,282 mn, PAT Rs 1,402 mn.
9M interest income stood at Rs 12,323 mn, PAT Rs 2,909 mn; Compliance Officer reappointed.
news.summary:
Home First Finance reported Q3 interest income of Rs 4,282 mn, PAT Rs 1,402 mn.
9M interest income stood at Rs 12,323 mn, PAT Rs 2,909 mn; Compliance Officer reappointed.

news.title:
Home First Finance schedules a board meeting on Jan 22, 2026, to review financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons and relatives from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results declaration.
news.summary:
Home First Finance schedules a board meeting on Jan 22, 2026, to review financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons and relatives from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results declaration.
